content.json:
# Syslog Traffic — Volume & Per-Host Anomaly
**Theme:** Syslog traffic monitoring · **Data source:** `Syslog` (Linux / network appliances via AMA).

Ingestion volume trends, top talkers, volume spikes vs a 7-day baseline, and newly-appearing hosts. Complements `04-syslog-monitoring` (which focuses on auth/severity).

> The z-score spike threshold (3.0) is a tunable starting point — baseline per host first.

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer | render timechart
content.title: Events per hour by host

content.query: Syslog | summarize Events=count() by Computer | top 25 by Events desc | render barchart
content.title: Top talkers by event volume

content.query: let baseline = Syslog | where TimeGenerated between (ago(7d) .. ago(1d)) | summarize c=count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | summarize Mean=avg(c), Std=stdev(c) by Computer; Syslog | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize Recent=count() by Computer, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h) | join kind=inner baseline on Computer | extend Z=iff(Std == 0, 0.0, round((Recent - Mean) / Std, 2)) | where Z > 3.0 | project TimeGenerated, Computer, Recent, Mean=round(Mean, 1), Z | sort by Z desc
content.title: Volume spikes vs 7d baseline (z > 3)

content.query: let seen = Syslog | where TimeGenerated < ago(1d) | distinct Computer; Syslog | where TimeGenerated > ago(1d) | summarize FirstSeen=min(TimeGenerated), Events=count() by Computer | where Computer !in (seen) | sort by FirstSeen desc
content.title: New hosts first-seen in window
